use_cases: Creating scrollable content containers with custom styled scrollbars
Building scrollable sidebars, panels, or sidebars in dashboards
Implementing scrollable lists or feeds in content-heavy interfaces
Adding accessible scrolling to overflow content areas
Replacing browser-default scrollbars with themed alternatives
ai_summary: A foundational scroll area component built on Radix UI primitives, providing accessible and customizable scrolling functionality with a styled vertical and horizontal scrollbar. Used as a building block for creating scrollable containers, panels, and content areas in any UI design system.
